response: The controlling shareholder of the world's fourth-largest tyre manufacturer is Jürgen M. Geissinger, who is the Chief Executive Officer of Senvion S.A. and also the former Chief Executive of Schaeffler Technologies AG & Co. KG. Schaeffler AG, which employs over 76,000 people across 180 locations in 50 countries, has annual sales of $14 billion and is the controlling shareholder of Continental AG.
